setup.title: How do you want to get started?
setup.subtitle: You don’t have a tenant set up yet. Pick a path — this shapes how your account is configured.
setup.flexibilityBody: Choosing one option now doesn’t stop you from signing up for the other later. You can add the other profile whenever you want.

seller.title: I’m a seller
seller.description: Refer customers with your coupon and track your results.
seller.point1: Ongoing commissions while referred customers keep paying with your coupon.
seller.point2: Free training and plenty of demo credits to show the product confidently.
seller.point3: Best if you want referral income without running a company workspace.

company.title: I want to create my company
company.description: Set up your operation and use the platform as a business owner.
company.point1: Company setup, team, and workspaces at your pace.
company.point2: Guidance for structuring operations and building AI systems for your business.
company.point3: Built for owners who want to run and scale on the platform.

index.title: Catalog
index.subtitle: Manage categories, products, and combos for your business.
index.howItWorksIntro: Build your menu in order: each step depends on the previous one. Start with categories, then add products, bundle them into combos, and preview the result.
index.stepCategoriesDesc: Create groups to organize your menu (e.g. Pizzas, Drinks). Every product must belong to a category.
index.stepProductsDesc: Register items with price, image, and optional add-ons. Products are linked to a category.
index.stepCombosDesc: Bundle two or more products at a special price. You need at least one product before creating combos.
index.stepViewDesc: See how customers will browse categories, products, and combos in your public catalog.
index.productsDesc: Create products with add-ons and variants.
index.viewDesc: See how customers will view your menu.

view.title: Catalog preview
view.subtitle: This is a preview of the menu your customers will see.
view.emptyHint: Add products and categories in the catalog to see them here.

aiToolsPage.abilityNamePlaceholder: E.g. Generate payment for the user
aiToolsPage.functionNameHint: Generated automatically in camelCase from the display name.
aiToolsPage.installChecklistFirst: Save the template checklist to your library before linking it to a tool.

aiToolsPage.responseSchemaReadOnlyHint: Schema is inherited from the selected source.
aiToolsPage.httpRequestBodySchemaHint: Paste the JSON payload sent on POST/PUT. Use import to create body fields from keys.
aiToolsPage.importResponseKeysAsBodyFields: Add response keys as body fields

jsonEditor.builderHint: Define each response field and its type. Updates the example on the right.
jsonEditor.splitHint: Builder and example stay in sync — edit either side.
jsonEditor.exampleHint: Paste or edit a real response sample. Updates the builder on the left.
jsonEditor.exampleEditorHint: JSON validation, autocomplete, and format on paste are enabled.
jsonEditor.sampleHelp: The example uses number (14), boolean (true), text ("hello"), and a nested object with string and number — same shape in every language.
jsonEditor.noFieldsYet: No fields yet — edit the JSON or click Add field.

checkCalendarDaysFree.description: Checks which weekdays are available for booking. Use when the customer asks about time slots.

registerScheduling.name: Register appointment
registerScheduling.description: Registers an appointment for the customer. Use when the customer confirms the desired time.

generatePayment.name: Generate payment for the user

getKanbanCustomerColumn.name: Get customer kanban column
getKanbanCustomerColumn.description: Returns which kanban column the customer is in.

createCustomerNotation.name: Create customer notation
createCustomerNotation.description: Creates an annotation about the customer (positive, negative, or neutral). Use to record observations, preferences, or context for future conversations. Optionally link to a pipeline card.

getCustomerNotations.name: List customer notations
getCustomerNotations.description: Lists annotations written about the customer. Use before updating context or when you need past notes about this customer.

updateCustomerNotation.name: Update customer notation
updateCustomerNotation.description: Updates an existing customer annotation (details, status, or linked pipeline card).

deleteCustomerNotation.name: Delete customer notation
deleteCustomerNotation.description: Removes a customer annotation by id when it is no longer accurate or relevant.

sendMessage.name: Send message to customer
sendMessage.description: Sends a text reply to the customer. Use when you have a final answer for the user.

hero.title: Welcome to Enterprise Management

teamCollaboration.title: Team Collaboration
teamCollaboration.description: Invite team members, assign roles, and collaborate seamlessly across your organization.

calendarManagement.title: Calendar Management
calendarManagement.description: Create, manage, and share calendars with your team. Sync with Google Calendar effortlessly.

googleIntegration.title: Google Integration
googleIntegration.description: Seamlessly connect with Google Workspace. Import and sync calendars automatically.

enterpriseSecurity.title: Enterprise Security
enterpriseSecurity.description: Role-based access control, secure authentication, and data protection for your organization.

lightningFast.title: Lightning Fast
lightningFast.description: Real-time updates, instant synchronization, and blazing-fast performance for all your needs.

scaleWithEase.title: Scale with Ease
scaleWithEase.description: From small teams to large organizations. Our platform grows with your business needs.

saveTime.title: Save Time

betterCollaboration.title: Better Collaboration

enterpriseSecurity.title: Enterprise-Grade Security

workFromAnywhere.title: Work from Anywhere

hero.title: realvidas
hero.subtitle: Unified Communication for Enterprises
hero.description: Connect WhatsApp, Instagram, Telegram and more in one powerful platform. Automate, manage and scale your business messaging.
hero.trustBadge: All your social networks in one place

features.title: Everything You Need to Succeed
features.subtitle: Powerful tools designed specifically for service professionals

smartScheduling.title: Smart Scheduling
smartScheduling.description: AI-powered scheduling that prevents double bookings, optimizes your calendar, and suggests the best times for appointments.

clientManagement.title: Client Management
clientManagement.description: Keep detailed records of all your clients, their preferences, appointment history, and send automated reminders.

multiCalendar.title: Multiple Calendars
multiCalendar.description: Manage multiple service providers, locations, and appointment types all in one unified platform.

aiAssistants.title: AI Assistants
aiAssistants.description: Let AI handle customer inquiries, booking confirmations, and follow-ups automatically via chat and WhatsApp.

socialIntegration.title: Social Media Integration
socialIntegration.description: Connect with Instagram, Facebook, WhatsApp and more. Let clients book directly from your social media profiles.

analytics.title: Business Analytics
analytics.description: Track revenue, popular services, peak hours, and client retention with detailed reports and insights.

payments.title: Payment Processing
payments.description: Accept payments online, create invoices, and manage your finances all in one place.

notifications.title: Smart Notifications
notifications.description: Automated SMS and email reminders reduce no-shows by up to 80% and keep your schedule full.

about.title: Built for Service Professionals
about.subtitle: We understand the unique challenges of managing a service-based business

story.title: Our Story
story.content: realvidas was created by service professionals who were frustrated with complicated, expensive scheduling software. We built a platform that's powerful yet simple, affordable yet feature-rich, and designed specifically for barbers, beauticians, and personal service providers.

mission.title: Our Mission
mission.content: To empower every service professional with technology that helps them focus on what they do best - providing exceptional service to their clients.

values.title: Our Values
values.simplicity: Simplicity - Easy to use, hard to mess up
values.affordability: Affordability - Professional tools at fair prices
values.support: Support - Real humans, real help, real fast

demos.title: See realvidas in Action
demos.subtitle: Discover how easy it is to manage your business

calendar.title: Intuitive Calendar View
calendar.description: Drag and drop appointments, see your whole week at a glance, and never miss a booking.

booking.title: Online Booking Portal
booking.description: Clients can book appointments 24/7 through your personalized booking page.

mobile.title: Mobile-First Design
mobile.description: Manage your business on the go with our responsive mobile interface.

ai.title: AI Chat Assistant
ai.description: Your virtual receptionist that handles bookings and questions automatically.

testimonial1.name: Maria Silva
testimonial1.content: realvidas transformed my business. I went from managing appointments on paper to having a fully automated system. No-shows decreased by 70%!

testimonial2.name: João Santos
testimonial2.content: The AI assistant is incredible. It handles bookings while I focus on my clients. My revenue increased 40% in just 3 months.

testimonial3.name: Ana Costa
testimonial3.content: Simple, affordable, and powerful. Everything I need in one place. The client management feature alone is worth it.

cta.title: Ready to Transform Your Business?
cta.subtitle: Join thousands of professionals already using realvidas

hero.title: Choose the Perfect Plan for Your Business
hero.subtitle: Manage schedules, clients, and grow your business with our powerful scheduling platform
hero.description: From solo professionals to large enterprises, we have a plan that fits your needs

starter.name: Starter
starter.description: Perfect for solo professionals getting started

professional.name: Professional
professional.description: Ideal for small teams and growing businesses

business.name: Business
business.description: Best for established businesses with multiple users

benefits.title: Everything You Need to Succeed
benefits.subtitle: Powerful features to help you manage your business efficiently

feature1.title: Smart Scheduling
feature1.description: AI-powered scheduling that prevents conflicts and optimizes your time

feature2.title: Client Management
feature2.description: Keep track of all your clients and their preferences in one place

feature3.title: Social Integration
feature3.description: Connect with clients through multiple social media platforms

feature4.title: Analytics & Reports
feature4.description: Gain insights into your business with detailed analytics and reports

feature5.title: Secure & Reliable
feature5.description: Enterprise-grade security to protect your data and your clients

feature6.title: 24/7 Support
feature6.description: Get help whenever you need it with our dedicated support team

faq.title: Frequently Asked Questions
faq.a1: Yes, you can upgrade or downgrade your plan at any time. Changes take effect immediately.
faq.a2: Credits are used for AI features, automated messaging, and advanced integrations.
faq.a3: Yes! All plans come with a 14-day free trial. No credit card required.
faq.q4: What happens to my data if I cancel?
faq.a4: Your data is securely stored for 30 days after cancellation, giving you time to export it.

testimonials.subtitle: Join thousands of businesses already using our platform
